description:
Small letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Rudimentary hand. Addresses "al-akhawayn al-shaykhayn al-akramayn" Abū [...] and Hiba. It seems to be from their brother Mubārak. There are only a couple lines of content, which are damaged and it's unclear how much can be read. 

Not digitized.
description_he: מכתב קטן ביהודית-ערבית, פונה לשני אחים זקנים אבו [...] והיבה, כנראה מאחיהם מובארק
